name: online-mind2web-stage1
notes: This lane is reserved for live browser execution after the Stage 0 fixture and WebArena-style contracts are green.
Runs must preserve provider, workflow profile, auth profile, final URL, action sequence, and verifier result for each saved result file.
required_before_scoring: pin task subset and source revision
record per-task allowed domains and mutation policy
run fast and governed profiles separately
publish raw result JSON and aggregate markdown report
